log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Satyr — Iron Concentration: SUCCESS. (had advantage) 17 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Satyr — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):3+6=9 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 2 ===
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Satyr — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:8+6=14 vs DC 15] FAIL! 6 psychic damage. HP: 93/99
→ ⚠ Archmage: Charm broken by damage! No longer incapacitated.
=== ROUND 3 ===

=== ROUND 4 ===

→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):15+8=23 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!

--- Satyr — Iron Concentration's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Satyr — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Satyr — Iron Concentration.
→ Satyr — Iron Concentration healed for 6 HP. HP: 20/67
